title: Errata
abstract: Jack P. Gibbs's article in our March 2000 issue—“Status Integration and Suicide: Occupational, Marital, or Both?” (78:949–68)—contained a number of errors, misplacements of tables, and other infelicities. All were the fault of the journal, which apologizes to Professor Gibbs and our readers. The entire article, corrected, will appear in our December 2000 issue, Vol. 79:2.
